author: ElfHosted
install_msg: Elrond Radar installed. Configure with [p]elrondradar setendpoint <url> and [p]elrondradar settoken <token>, then [p]elrondradar enable.
name: elrondradar
short: Bridge staff Discord reactions to Elrond support radar.
description: Listens for staff reaction events and forwards supported status reactions to Elrond's OpenClaw webhook route.
